## Datadog estimated as potentially ~16% overvalued despite Gartner recognition and positive earnings sentiment

DDOG's valuation premium is under scrutiny even as qualitative signals remain constructive — a sign that the market is demanding more tangible AI monetization evidence to support the multiple. For PM long DDOG, this frames the next earnings print as a test of whether the premium is defensible.

- An analysis estimates DDOG shares could be overvalued by approximately 16% at current levels, per the headline.
- The overvaluation view persists despite favorable Gartner recognition and earnings optimism.
- Raises valuation discipline questions for observability and AI monitoring plays trading at premium multiples.
- No revised earnings estimates or specific price target are provided in the headline.
